name: Cooling System
bonus3: Skill Critical Hits reduce Artillery Turret Cooldown by 1.20%. Talent Cooldown: 1 second.

name: Area Suppression
bonus3: Artillery Turret hits on up to 1 enemies have a 50% chance of granting +2% Skill Critical Damage for 10 second(s), up to 5 stack(s). Hits on more than 1 enemies have a guaranteed chance of granting the bonus.

name: Frag Grenades
bonus3: Artillery Turret damage grants +1% Skill Multi-Shot Chance for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Cooling Device
bonus3: Explosive Seeker Mine Critical Hits reduce Explosive Seeker Mine Cooldown by 10%. Talent Cooldown: 3 seconds.

name: Applied Demolitions
bonus3: Explosive Seeker Mine hits on up to 1 enemies grant +3.20% Skill Critical Damage for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Fragmentation Charge
bonus3: Explosive Seeker Mine hits grant +6.40% Skill Multi-Shot Chance for 10 seconds.

name: Ace
bonus3: Skill Critical Hits grant +0.30% Signature Ability Charge. Talent Cooldown: 1 second.

name: Airburst
bonus3: M32A1 Grenade Launcher hits on up to 1 enemies grant +6% Skill Critical Damage until the next M32A1 Grenade Launcher hit.

name: Concentrated Fire
bonus3: Dealing 5 M32A1 Grenade Launcher hits in 3 seconds grants +14.40% Skill Intensity for 15 seconds.

name: Prioritized Targets
bonus3: Artillery Turret hits on enemies afflicted by Bleed or Vulnerable grant +1.44% Firepower for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Optimized
bonus3: Grants +8% Artillery Turret Rate of Fire. Artillery Turret hits on up to 2 enemies grant +0.50 second(s) to Artillery Turret duration (capped at 6 seconds).

name: Wingman
bonus3: Artillery Turret hits grant +1.20% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.

name: Contagion
bonus3: Explosive Seeker Mine hits on enemies afflicted by Bleed or Vulnerable apply the same debuff to all enemies within 10 meter(s) and grant +7.20% Firepower for 10 second(s).

name: Area Denial
bonus3: Grants +8.60% Explosive Seeker Mine Radius. Explosive Seeker Mine hits grant +1.60 second(s) to the duration of deployed Artillery Turrets.

name: Surgical Strike
bonus3: Explosive Seeker Mine hits grant +7.20% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 seconds. Talent Cooldown: 1 second.

name: Field Mortar
bonus3: Increases 9.60% Weapon Damage to enemies hit by M32A1 Grenade Launcher for 20 second(s) and extends the duration of Artillery Turret by 2 second(s).

name: Thermobaric Grenades
bonus3: Reduces Grenades in Grenade Launcher to 1, expands the Explosion Radius by 100% and increases damage by 460%.

name: Precision Fires
bonus3: Landing 3 M32A1 Grenade Launcher hits grants +8% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 second(s).

name: Supercharged
bonus3: Deploying a Striker Drone restores Health equal to 5.60% Missing Health. Also grants +3% Movement Speed and +1% Skill Cooldown Recovery for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Thermite Charge
bonus3: Striker Drone Critical Hits have a 5% chance of exploding, dealing 300% damage.

name: Extermination
bonus3: Hitting enemies who have less than 50% Health grants +9.60% Striker Drone Multi-Shot Chance.

name: Exhaustion
bonus3: Striker Drone hits on Drone Locked enemies have a 5% chance of granting 4.80% Damage Reduction from the targets for 10 second(s), up to 3 stack(s). Probability increases to 15% for targets who are at least 20 meter(s) away.

name: Stabilized Flight
bonus3: Applying Drone Lock grants +6% Skill Critical Hit Chance for 20 seconds.

name: Area Sweep
bonus3: Killing Drone Locked enemies grants +4.80% Skill Multi-Shot Chance for 10 seconds.

name: Supply Line
bonus3: Within 30 second(s) of activating Drone Overload, Striker Drone hits have a 5% chance of restoring 2% Max Health. Probability increases to 10% for targets who are at least 20 meter(s) away.

name: Optimized Targeting
bonus3: Within 30 second(s) of activating Drone Overload, Striker Drone hits have a 10% chance of granting +10.80% Skill Critical Hit Chance for 20 second(s).

name: Lethal Sweep
bonus3: Within 20 second(s) of activating Drone Overload, kills grant +3.20% Skill Multi-Shot Chance for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Close Protection
bonus3: Mender Drone healing grants +2.00% Healing Intensity for 20 second(s), up to 6 stack(s). Grants an additional +3.20% Healing Intensity over 3 stack(s).

name: Combat Enhancer
bonus3: Mender Drone healing grants bonus damage equal to 6.60% Engineering for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Enhanced Chip
bonus3: Deploying a Mender Drone grants +3.20% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Reinforced Support
bonus3: First-Aid Firefly healing restores additional Health over 20 second(s). During that time, First-Aid Firefly restores an additional 30.00% Health when healing the same target.

name: Teamfight
bonus3: Hits deal additional damage equal to 80% Engineering for 8 second(s) after deploying a First-Aid Firefly. This bonus is also granted to the ally who is targeted by the First-Aid Firefly.

name: Accelerated Deployment
bonus3: Deploying a First-Aid Firefly grants 32.00 Signature Ability Charge(s). Grants +40.00% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency if the target of the First-Aid Firefly has less than 50% Health.

name: Support Pattern
bonus3: Defender Drone can follow either the Agent or a group member, providing Extra Health to the target followed. Extra Health increases by 300% per second.

name: Hazardous Area
bonus3: Defender Drone deals damage to enemies within its radius every second.

name: Magnetic Recharge
bonus3: When Defender Drone grants a Shield to either the Agent or a group member, increases Signature Ability Charge(s) by 2.00%.

name: Reciprocal Charge
bonus3: When Health is below 50%, Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits restore Health equal to 0.80% Max Health. When Health is above 50%, Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits grant +12% Weapon Critical Hit Damage.

name: Pack-a-Punch
bonus3: Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits grant +1.60% Weapon Damage for 5 second(s), up to 5 stack(s).

name: King of the Pit
bonus3: Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits grant +4% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 second(s), up to 4 stack(s).

name: Field Repairs
bonus3: Deploying the Phalanx Shield grants +4% Rate of Fire. Hits restore 0.60% Shield Health. Talent Cooldown: 1 second(s).

name: Impenetrable Wall
bonus3: Grants +12% Toughness while the Phalanx Shield is deployed.

name: Positive Feedback
bonus3: Within 6 second(s) of deploying the Breach Combo, hits have a 40% chance of restoring 1 bullet(s). Critical Hits increase duration to 0.50 second(s) (capped at 2 second(s)).

name: Optimal Range
bonus3: Deploying the Breach Combo grants +12% Rate of Fire. Hits on enemies within 10 meter(s) restore 1 bullets (capped at 3 bullets). Talent Cooldown: 1 second(s).

name: Berserker
bonus3: During Breach Combo, grants +100% Weapon Critical Hit Chance if there are at least 1 enemie(s) within 20 meter(s).

name: Attention Seeker
bonus3: Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits grant +1.20% Damage Reduction, up to 5 stack(s), but nearby enemies focus the Agent in priority.

name: Schadenfreude
bonus3: Shockwave Spike Mk.3 hits grant +0.80% Max Health for 20 second(s), up to 5 stack(s). Shockwave Spike Mk.3 deals additional damage equal to 0.60% Max Health.

name: Camp Fire
bonus3: Grants +14% Armor while located within 10 meter(s) of the Shockwave Spike Mk.3.

name: Provocateur
bonus3: Enemies within 20 meter(s) focus the Agent in priority when deploying the Phalanx Shield. Grants +3.20% Damage Reduction for 10 second(s) for each enemy who is targeting the Agent, up to 5 stack(s). Talent Cooldown: 20 second(s).

name: Rational Distribution
bonus3: Grants Extra Shield Health equal to 9.20% Max Health.

name: Last Moment
bonus3: Reaching 10% Phalanx Shield Health restores 15% Max Shield Health. Talent Cooldown: 30 second(s).

name: Anchored
bonus3: Breach Combo hits restore Shield Health and Health equal to 4.20% Max Health.

name: Heavy Weight
bonus3: Breach Combo hits deal additional damage equal to 10% Max Health.

name: Tough Times
bonus3: Breach Combo hits grant +33.80% Armor for 15 second(s), up to 5 stack(s).

name: Adaptive Armor
bonus3: Grants +9.60% Weapon Critical Hit Damage when Shield Health is above 50%. Grants +4.80% Shield Damage Reduction when Shield Health is below 50%.

name: Effective Deterrent
bonus3: While behind a Smart Cover, grants +1% Damage, up to 3 stack(s). Reaching maximum stacks grants +3% Signature Ability Charge Efficiency. This bonus resets upon leaving the Smart Cover.

name: Pulse Enhancement
bonus3: Deploying Scanning Pulse grants Pulsed allies Weapon Critical Hit Chance equal to 3.60% Engineering for 10 second(s).

name: Scout
bonus3: Pulsed enemies grant +8 Signature Ability Charge to the ally team.

name: Compound Effect
bonus3: Deploying Scanning Pulse while Fortified reduces the Skill Cooldown by 1.50 second(s).

name: Bugle Call
bonus3: Deploying Tactical Link grants +14.40% Rate of Fire, Damage Reduction, and Movement Speed for 15 second(s).

name: Tactical Reinforcement
bonus3: Increases Signature Ability Charge Efficiency of players applied with Tactical Link by 28.80%.

name: Liquid Nitrogen
bonus3: Players with self-applied Tactical Link effect have a 10% chance to reduce all skill cooldowns by 0.80 seconds on each enemy hit, with a cooldown of 5 seconds between each trigger.

name: Smart Cover Defense
bonus3: Smart Cover provides bonus Damage Reduction and Weapon Damage to allies using it.

name: Advanced Intel
bonus3: Scanning Pulse reveals additional enemy weaknesses, granting bonus Weapon Critical Hit Chance.

name: Coordinated Strike
bonus3: Tactical Link grants coordinated attack bonuses when multiple allies attack the same target.

name: Suppression Field
bonus3: Smart Cover generates a suppression field that slows enemies entering cover range.

name: Overwatch
bonus3: Scanning Pulse marks enemies for allies, granting bonus Weapon Damage against marked targets.

name: Link Booster
bonus3: Tactical Link bonus effects are enhanced and have extended duration.

name: Fortification
bonus3: Smart Cover deployment grants Fortified status to allies within range.

name: Signal Disruption
bonus3: Scanning Pulse disrupts enemy skills and electronics on Pulsed targets.

name: Commando
bonus3: Kills or assists while using Tactical Link grant +10.20% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 10 second(s).

name: Armored Train
bonus3: While behind a Smart Cover, weapon hits have a 5% chance of granting +2% Weapon Critical Hit Chance for 20 second(s), up to 3 stack(s).

name: Field Supplies
bonus3: Kills or assists on Pulsed enemies restore 6% Health and refill 6.40% of the current magazine.

name: Tactical Insight
bonus3: Deploying Scanning Pulse restores 48 Signature Ability Charge, increased by 64 if there are more than 3 enemies within 70 meter(s).

name: Armor Strengthening
bonus3: Grants +32.00% Armor while located within 20 meter(s) of a Chemical Trap.

name: Lightweight
bonus3: Chemical Trap can be deployed farther away. Hits on enemies inside Chemical Traps apply 1 stack(s) of Corrosive. Headshots apply 4 stacks instead. Talent Cooldown: 1.50 seconds.

name: Siphon
bonus3: Using a Chemical Trap to apply a stack of Corrosive has a 50% chance of restoring 4 Signature Ability Charge. Talent Cooldown: 0.50 seconds.

name: Hereafter Resilience
bonus3: When deploying Oxidizing Hive, you lose Health equal to 25% of your current Health but gain Extra Health equal to 35.00% of Max Health and 5% Armor for 20s. When Oxidizing Hive is attached to your backpack, it releases Micro Corrosive Drones to enemies within 15.00m every 1.60s.

name: Improved Formula
bonus3: If Oxidizing Hive is attached to your backpack and no enemy is hit by your weapon within 3s, hitting enemies with your weapon will trigger Oxidizing Hive to release 13 Mini Corrosive Drones flying towards the target and applying Corrosion to them.

name: Generative Formula
bonus3: While being assisted by the Oxidizing Hive, hits restore 8 Signature Ability Charge. Talent Cooldown: 2 seconds.

name: Enhanced Formula
bonus3: Oxidizing Swarm hits inflict -12% Damage for 20 seconds. Killing an enemy within 20 meter(s) who is also afflicted by this debuff restores Health equal to 8% Missing Health for 20 second(s).

name: Augmented Range
bonus3: Oxidizing Swarm can be thrown farther away. Oxidizing Swarm hits that are at least 20 meter(s) away inflict -14.40% Damage Reduction for 10 second(s).

name: Harvest
bonus3: Oxidizing Swarm hits reduce Skill Cooldown by 2.40 seconds.

name: Detrimental Treatment
bonus3: Support Station deals damage to enemies who are within its radius. Damage is increased by 25% while located within the radius of a Support Station.

name: Auto Trauma Treatment
bonus3: Grants +6% Incoming Healing and automatically revives any member of the ally team who is downed within the radius of a Support Station.

name: Effective Triage
bonus3: Grants +40% Incoming Healing to any ally below 50% Health who is located within the radius of a Support Station.

name: Defensive Measures
bonus3: When Healing Hive is active, hitting enemies within 20m with weapons deals additional damage equal to 240% of your Toughness. Trigger Interval: 2s.

name: Buddy Treatment
bonus3: When using Healing Hive, if your and your teammate's Health is below 50%, increases by 2.00%. Using it on you deploys micro Mender Drones to your teammates within 2 meters, restore a small amount of Health if deployed (It won't grant buffs of Specialization Focus).

name: Mutual Support
bonus3: While Healing Hive is deployed, grants +9.60% Skill Intensity when located within 20 meter(s) of an ally. While Healing Hive is deployed, grants +20% Movement Speed when located at least 20 meter(s) away from allies.

name: Aggressive Drones
bonus3: Instead of healing allies, Healing Swarm deals damage to enemies by releasing 16 nano-drones that target enemies every 1.50 second(s).

name: Emergency Measures
bonus3: Healing Swarm heals allies over 10 seconds. When an ally's Health drops to 0 during the healing process, restores Health equal to 16% Max Health to them for 5 second(s).

name: Doom Dealer
bonus3: For each ally healed by Healing Swarm, grants +1.20% Skill Intensity for 20 second(s), up to 16 stack(s).

name: Chemical Recharge
bonus3: Killing an enemy affected by Chemical Trap reduces the cooldown of your second equipped ability by 4.80 seconds.

name: Optimal Awareness
bonus3: Each enemy scanned within 70 meter increases Weapon Critical Hit Chance by 1.40%, up to 8 times.

name: Ammo Refill
bonus3: Every shot during the first 6 seconds of Tactical Link grants 29% chance of recovering 1 ammo. Duration resets at each kill.
